subject: test(components): add RTL + jsdom infrastructure and regression suite for touched primitives
body:
Closes the deferred testing item from the tier-3 wrap. The previous
session flagged "component-level test setup" as a pre-existing gap and
punted it to TODO.md; this commit owns the work end-to-end.

Infrastructure:
- Installed @testing-library/react + @testing-library/jest-dom +
  @testing-library/user-event + jsdom as devDeps.
- vitest.config.ts (new) — jsdom environment + setupFiles, kept
  separate from vite.config.ts so PWA/Tailwind plugins don't run
  during test startup.
- tsconfig.test.json: added "jsx": "react-jsx" so .tsx tests compile.
- src/__tests__/setup.ts (new) — registers jest-dom matchers,
  auto-cleans the RTL tree after each test, and ships a minimal
  HTMLDialogElement.showModal/close shim that jsdom doesn't provide
  natively (Modal's top-layer contract needs it).
- iconCacheBust + pwaSingleton tests opt out of jsdom via a
  `// @vitest-environment node` docblock — they have no DOM needs.

Regression coverage (9 new test files, 49 new tests):
- formFieldId — 6 pure-fn tests on the label→slug + id-override logic.
- useProjectRole — 5 hook tests via a real AuthContext wrapper.
- HeadingInput — 3 tests: value/onChange forwarding, className merge
  order, autoFocus + HTMLInputAttributes passthrough.
- Input + TextArea — 9 tests total: label→slug id, explicit id
  override, error alert + aria wiring, no-error path, className merge.
- Toast — 7 tests INCLUDING TWO THAT REGRESS THE LOAD-BEARING
  `onDone` IDENTITY-STABILITY CLAIM. Stable-ref case dismisses once
  after duration; unstable-ref case re-arms the timer every rerender
  and never fires — the exact bug that motivates the 4 page-level
  `clearToast = useCallback(...)` Keeps across ProjectListPage /
  ProjectDetailPage / AgreementDetailPage / ModuleEditorPage.
- ToneSelector — 7 tests: default tones render, Recent section
  conditional, lazy-init snapshot at mount, post-mount localStorage
  mutation is NOT picked up (useState lazy-init semantics), Enter
  submits the custom input, validation errors surface, Add-disabled
  when empty.
- Modal — 7 tests: no-render when closed, title + body + × when
  open, × click, backdrop click, inside-modal-box click does NOT
  close, dialog close event bridges, AND useFocusTrap wraps Tab
  last→first + Shift+Tab first→last.
- ConfirmDialog — 5 tests: closed, open + custom confirmLabel,
  Confirm runs onConfirm-then-onClose in order, Cancel runs only
  onClose.

Result: `npm test` now runs 11 files / 71 passing / 3 skipped
(dist-level icon-cache-bust auto-skip without `dist/`). Previous:
2 files / 22 passing. tsc -b clean, eslint clean.

TODO.md "Testing Infrastructure" entry replaced with the remaining
gaps (complex composites: ContractUploadPreview, TemplateSelector,
NotificationBell, BurgerMenu, PwaInstallPrompt, ModuleSummaryEditor,
AddNoteForm / ProposeChangeForm / IntentSelector) + E2E (Playwright
or equivalent). Manual browser smoke-test still open as a separate
item.

Tags: testing, infrastructure, rtl, vitest
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: custom-code-reduction
Semver: patch
